zh.lifeSummary: 當Jean de Bourgogne於1231年3月30日出生在法國布格-福朗-可特艾o-達迪喬時，他的父親Hugues IV duc de Bourgogne18歲，母親Yolande de Dreux18歲。他於1247年與Agnès de Bourbon結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1267年10月1日在法國奧維-o-阿爾培斯阿利也姆林斯享年36歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bourgogne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Bourgoin
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alphee, Alyre, Andre, Armand, Aurore, Celina, Emile, Gilberte, Jacques, Laurent, Lucienne, Olivier.

variant of Bourgouin (and, in North America, an altered form of this), a habitational name for someone from Burgundy (Old French Bourgogne), a region of eastern France having Dijon as its center. The area was invaded by the Burgundii, an ancient Germanic tribe from whom it takes its name, in about AD 480. The duchy of Burgundy, created in 877 by Charles II, King of the Western Franks, was extremely powerful in the later Middle Ages, especially under Philip the Bold (1342–1404; duke from 1363). Compare Bourgoyne and Bourguignon .

nameMeanings.name: Jean
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Like Jane and Joan , a medieval variant of Old French Je(h)anne. Towards the end of the Middle Ages this form became largely confined to Scotland. In the 20th century it became more widely used in the English-speaking world and enjoyed a period of great popularity, but it is now out of fashion. Among numerous well-known and influential bearers are the British novelists Jean Plaidy ( Eleanor Hibbert , 1910–93 ) and Jean Rhys ( Ella Gwendolen Rees Williams , 1894–1979 ), British actress Jean Simmons ( 1929–2010 ), and American-born actress Jean Seberg ( 1938–79 ). It is also found as a variant spelling of the masculine name Gene .

en.lifeSummary: When Jean de Bourgogne was born on 30 March 1231, in Dijon, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France, his father, Hugues IV duc de Bourgogne, was 18 and his mother, Yolande de Dreux, was 18. He married Agnès de Bourbon in 1247. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died on 1 October 1267, in Moulins, Allier, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France, at the age of 36.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jean de Bourgogne est né le 30 mars 1231, à Dijon, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France, son père, Hugues IV duc de Bourgogne, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Yolande de Dreux, avait 18 ans. Il a épousé Agnès de Bourbon en 1247. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé le 1 octobre 1267, à Moulins, Allier, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France, à l’âge de 36 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jean de Bourgogne am 30. März 1231 in Dijon, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hugues IV duc de Bourgogne 18 und seine Mutter Yolande de Dreux 18. Er hat 1247 Agnès de Bourbon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb am 1. Oktober 1267 im Alter von 36 Jahren in Moulins, Allier, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jean de Bourgogne è nato il il 30 marzo 1231 nel Dijon, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia, il suo padre, Hugues IV duc de Bourgogne, aveva 18 anni e il suo madre, Yolande de Dreux, aveva 18 anni. Lui sposato Agnès de Bourbon nel 1247. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì il 1 ottobre 1267, nel Moulins, Allier, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia, all'età di 36 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Jean de Bourgogneが1231年3月30日にフランスボウルゴグネ-フランチェ-コムトeクoテ-ド'オルディジョンで生まれた時，父Hugues IV duc de Bourgogneは18歳，母Yolande de Dreuxは18歳であった。1247年にAgnès de Bourbonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1267年10月1日にフランスアウバーグネ-ルhoネ-アルペスアリールモウリンスで36歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Jean de Bourgogne(이)가 1231년 3월 30일 프랑스 부르고그니-프랭체-코트e co테-드'어 디조에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hugues IV duc de Bourgogne(은)는 18세였고, 그의 어머니 Yolande de Dreux(은)는 18세였다. 그는 1247년 Agnès de Bourbon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1267년 10월 1일 프랑스 오버그니-ho니-알프스 앨리어 모우린스에서 36세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.30 MAR 1231–1 OCT 1267: 30 de março de 1231–1 de outubro de 1267
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jean de Bourgogne nasceu em 30 de março de 1231, em Dijon, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, França, seu pai, Hugues IV duc de Bourgogne, tinha 18 anos e sua mãe, Yolande de Dreux, tinha 18 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnès de Bourbon em 1247. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1 de outubro de 1267, em Moulins, Allier, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, França, com 36 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jean de Bourgogne родился 30 марта 1231 г. в местности диджон, кoте-д'ор, бургогне-фрэнче-комтe, Франция, его отцу по имени Hugues IV duc de Bourgogne было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Yolande de Dreux, 18. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnès de Bourbon в 1247 г. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер 1 октября 1267 г. в местности моулинс, аллиир, аувиргне-рoне-алпесь, Франция в возрасте 36 лет.

es.30 MAR 1231–1 OCT 1267: 30 de marzo de 1231–1 de octubre de 1267
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jean de Bourgogne nació el 30 de marzo de 1231, en Dijon, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia, su papá, Hugues IV duc de Bourgogne, tenía 18 años y su mamá, Yolande de Dreux, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Agnès de Bourbon en 1247. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió el 1 de octubre de 1267, en Moulins, Allier, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia, a la edad de 36 años.
